cards.back: A statistical method to test a hypothesis about a population parameter by analyzing a sample
A statistical method to compare the performance of two or more versions of a product, system, or process
A technique in statistical inference where a sample is repeatedly taken with replacement or without replacement to estimate a population parameter
A default hypothesis that there is no significant difference or relationship between variables, to be tested against the alternative hypothesis
A probability value that represents the significance of the observed difference or relationship between variables
